Notice Of Mtoion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories-General And Order For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft Ching Tee;
Off Calendar Feb-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Darius T. Chan, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Jun Hong Zhou
Ching Tee, defendant and opposing party in Propria Persona

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Jun Hong Zhou's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 7 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $420 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
